---
title: "test_web"
toc: true
---

This is a Quarto website.

# Hello world and hello Suzie, Chris, Nenu and Marcus

Can make a website to support our ways of working.  We can add links etc

## We can add sub headings

And this will translate into interactive headings


# R Code

We can also use this to run R and python code which will allow us to add graphs and tables if needed

```{r}
summary(mtcars)
```


# Third heading

## Sub heading


# Next head 

The formatting is all in quarto and so we can add additional interactive elements, tabsets, drops downs 

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" appearance="default" icon="true"}
## Furhter information (click to expand)

Code is save on github and update of the repo updates the website

:::
